calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-02-2020 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-25-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Kelley for Petitioner.

The Court asked Mr. Kelley if he has anything to add on Joanne Cella's $11,000.00 claim. Mr. Kelley stated that his Client is the Sister of the Decedent, the residual beneficiary of the trust and the sole beneficiary of the estate, and that there is more than enough money to pay the respective gifts. Mr. Kelley also stated that he has spoken with his Client, that she wants to fulfill her Sister's wishes and that she wants to avoid any disputes. The Court noted that the $11,000.00 can go to Ms. Schwartz and that she can give it to whoever she wants, and that there is a procedure for submitting a claim against an estate. The Court also stated that the All Shows claim/paper work looks a little informal. Mr. Kelley stated that these are VIP tickets to very exclusive events, that everything is done on-line, that this is what was generated and that Shelly is Michelle. The Petition for Final Distribution, etc. is under submission.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: J. Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2020 Continued To Feb-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
